message:
feat(ufunc): expand lstsq to return full NumPy 4-tuple (x, residuals, rank, singular_values)

Change UFuncArray::lstsq() return type from Result<Self> to
Result<(Self, Self, usize, Self)> matching NumPy's np.linalg.lstsq
4-tuple contract:
  - x: least-squares solution vector
  - residuals: sum of squared residuals (length 1 if m > n and full
    rank, length 0 otherwise)
  - rank: effective rank of the coefficient matrix
  - singular_values: singular values of A in descending order

Internally switches from lstsq_nxn to lstsq_svd (SVD-based solver)
which computes rank and singular values as part of the decomposition,
with rcond=-1.0 for machine-epsilon cutoff.

Update both existing lstsq tests (identity and overdetermined) to
destructure the 4-tuple and add assertions for rank and singular
value shape.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
